# Extensions.RequiredExtensionAbsentCode field

The JSON-RPC error code an implementation that MANDATES an extension uses when the other side does not advertise it and it refuses the interaction (spec R-24.7-f). The framework mints no code of its own; a mandated-but-absent extension is a "missing required capability" condition, so this reuses the core `-32003` code.

```csharp
public const int RequiredExtensionAbsentCode;
```
